footer.tagline: Managed performance engineering, at startup speed.

hero.headline:
Your systems are slow.
Your team doesn't know why.
hero.subheadline: Vantix is your external performance and SRE team. Monitoring, load testing, and observability as a continuously improving managed capability.

pain.heading: Does this sound familiar?
pain.subheading: If you're a CTO or engineering manager at a scaling SaaS, you've probably faced at least one of these.

cards.title: Alerts firing at 3 AM
cards.body: Your on-call rotation is exhausted and alerts are noise — no one knows which ones actually matter.

cards.title: Monitoring tools, zero insights
cards.body: You have Datadog or Grafana, but no one has time to build the dashboards that tell you something useful.

cards.title: Load tests that don't exist
cards.body: You find out about performance bottlenecks in production, from customers, at the worst possible moment.

cards.title: No SRE, no budget for one
cards.body: A senior SRE costs $150K+/yr. You need the expertise without the full-time hire.

cards.title: Every release is a guess
cards.body: Deploys go out without any baseline — you don't know if today's release made things better or worse.

cards.title: Incident retrospectives go nowhere
cards.body: You write up the post-mortem. Nothing changes. The same incident happens again three months later.

services.heading: What we deliver
services.subheading: Three managed capabilities, designed to be combined.

observability.headline: See everything that matters.
observability.description: We instrument your systems, build the dashboards that actually answer your questions, and tune your alerts so they fire when something is wrong — not just when a threshold is crossed.
features: Curated dashboards by service and team
Alert tuning — noise reduction, actionable runbooks

performance.headline: Know your limits before your users do.
performance.description: Continuous k6 load testing built into your CI/CD pipeline. We write the scripts, baseline your services, define the SLOs, and track them over time.
features: k6 load test suite (peak, soak, spike)

sre.headline: Senior SRE expertise, startup budget.
sre.description: A dedicated SRE (fractional) embedded in your engineering team. Architecture review, reliability roadmap, incident command, and the hands-on work to make it real.

pricing.heading: Transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: No surprise invoices. No "contact us for pricing." Three tiers — pick what fits.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: One managed capability to get started.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: All three services plus fractional SRE.

cta_section.heading: Ready to stop guessing?
cta_section.subheading: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll review your current setup and show you exactly what we'd change first.
